'''Ithmir''' was a [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorrean]] who owned a small [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]] called the [[Thorip Norr]], which was located in the city of [[Lola Curich]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Lianna/Legends|Lianna]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Mission to Lianna]]'' {{1st}}
